Index.title: Delivery Management
Index.subtitle: Streamline deliveries for every resident.
Index.card1Desc: Log every incoming parcel with apartment number, carrier, and a unique tracking code. Concierges register deliveries in seconds — residents are notified automatically.
Index.card2Desc: Generate a unique QR code per parcel. Residents scan it on pickup for frictionless, verified retrieval.
Index.card3Desc: Real-time Web Push alerts to residents when a parcel arrives or is ready for pickup.
Index.card4Desc: Full audit trail — reception date, pickup date, and who collected each parcel.
Index.card5Desc: Frontend on Vercel, database on Railway. CI/CD pipeline ready for Sprint 5.
Index.card6Desc: Overview of pending parcels, delivered items, and resident management — all in one panel.
